channel.title: QR Peach
channel.description: QR reference, interactive Create page, and browser library updates.

item.title: QR Peach Home
item.description: Overview of QR Peach and links to learn, create, and developers pages.

item.title: Learn How QR Codes Work
item.description: Detailed guide covering QR symbol structure, ECC, masking, and capacity.

item.title: QR Peach Create
item.description: Interactive page for creating and debugging QR payloads in the browser.

item.title: QR Peach Developers
item.description: Developer documentation for the library, API entry points, npm, CDN links, and release assets.

item.title: Minimal Demo Example
item.description: Smallest QR Peach browser example with SVG output.
